evidence_summary: At least four controlled variants were tested without strict-score improvement or meaningful safe subcategory gains.
final_recommendation_label: candidate not viable after feedback loops
important_distinction: The first broad non-shadow variant regressed; these reports evaluate controlled variants and do not claim the whole semantic-router idea is universally useless.

iterations.exact_change_made: Apply hints only for UNKNOWN, confidence < 0.35, or explicit ambiguous phrase plus weak schema relevance.

iterations.exact_change_made: Allow route/domain/candidate priority changes but keep helper intent as metadata only.

iterations.hypothesis: Dry-run API behavior may hurt answers; semantic hints should not force API routes unless the existing route already expects API evidence.
iterations.next_iteration_recommendation: Summarize all variants and keep the helper disabled/shadow-only unless a later explicit promotion is approved.
